query: SELECT 'overdue_tasks' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') AND dueAt < NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_tasks' as metric, COUNT(*) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') UNION ALL SELECT 'deals_with_overdue' as metric, COUNT(DISTINCT entityId) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') AND dueAt < NOW();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT 'overdue_tasks' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') AND dueAt < NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_tasks' as metric, COUNT(*) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') UNION ALL SELECT 'deals_with_overdue' as metric, COUNT(DISTINCT entityId) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled') AND dueAt < NOW();
